title: Faithful Mace Port
description: Its the Faithful Mace mod Ported to version 1.20.2
body:
Hey you, do you want the mace but your only on version 1.20.2? Well, here it is! This is the Faithful Mace mod ported from 1.20.1 to 1.20.2 because why not..?

The mod adds:
- The Mace
- All the mace enchantments
- Wind charges

There are crafting recipes for each

![Wind Charge Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47fc93ae4618c449a0cea19756306192705224a5.png)

![Mace Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/475b78ea2a2c83ff2fdcb2b092b3c11c0d189ebd.png)

OG mod by pvpranked | This is a ported version to 1.20.2
